name: bec-plugins
description: Suitsupply Backend Chapter plugins for Claude Code.

plugins.name: backend-chapter
plugins.description: Jira ticket refinement, splitting, test analysis, and development agents.

plugins.name: email-agent-learning
plugins.description: Builds a local EMAIL-AGENT.md knowledge file by mining agent conversation transcripts.

plugins.name: continuous-documentation
plugins.description: Keeps the repository README.md current by documenting each commit — diff plus conversational reasoning.

plugins.name: out-of-process-tests
plugins.description: Scaffold Suitsupply out-of-process tests (contract, e2e, data-validation) into a repo.
